roadClosures.road: BNSF RR Crossing on FM 2246 near FM 1131
roadClosures.description: - The roadway is closed due to Other conditions. - Follow the marked detour - Motorists should expect delays. FM 2246 Westbound and Eastbound Lanes at BNSF Railroad Crossing near FM 1131 will have a 24 Hour Closure from 5:00AM on Wednesday, 4/29/26 through Thursday 4/30/26 at 5:00AM for Railroad Tie Replacement Project. Please use an alternate route or follow the marked detour. All work is weather permitting and subject to delays and changes. Please use Caution and expect Delays. Check DRIVETEXAS.ORG for updates.
